results.text: High-risk AI systems shall comply with the requirements laid down in this Section, taking into account High - risk AI systems' intended purpose as well as the generally acknowledged state of the art on AI and AI-related technologies.
results.object: with the requirements laid down in this Section, taking into account High - risk AI systems' intended purpose as well as the generally acknowledged state of the art on AI and AI-related technologies.

results.text: When ensuring compliance with those requirements, The Provider SHALL take into account the risk management system referred to in Article 9.
results.object: into account the risk management system referred to in Article 9.
results.condition: When ensuring compliance with those requirements

results.text: Where a product contains an AI system, to which the requirements of this Regulation as well as requirements of the Union harmonisation legislation listed in Section A of Annex I apply, providers shall be responsible for ensuring that a product's product is fully compliant with all applicable requirements under applicable Union harmonisation legislation.
results.object: for ensuring that a product's product is fully compliant with all applicable requirements under applicable Union harmonisation legislation.
results.condition: Where a product contains an AI system

results.text: In ensuring the compliance of high-risk AI systems referred to in paragraph 1 with the requirements set out in this Section, and in order to ensure consistency, avoid duplication and minimise additional burdens, providers shall have a choice of integrating, as appropriate, the necessary testing and reporting processes, information and documentation the compliance of high - risk AI systems provide with regard to the compliance of high - risk AI systems' product into documentation and procedures that already exist and are required under the Union harmonisation legislation listed in Section A of Annex I.
results.object: a choice of integrating, as appropriate, the necessary testing and reporting processes, information and documentation the compliance of high - risk AI systems provide with regard to the compliance of high - risk AI systems' product into documentation and procedures that already exist and are required under the Union harmonisation legislation listed in Section A of Annex I.
results.manner: as appropriate

results.text: The Organization SHALL establish, implement, document, and maintain a risk management system in relation to high-risk AI systems.
results.object: implement, document, and maintain a risk management system in relation to high-risk AI systems.

results.text: For providers of high-risk AI systems that are subject to requirements regarding internal risk management processes under other relevant provisions of Union law, the aspects provided in paragraphs 1 to 9 may be part of, or combined with, the risk management procedures established pursuant to that law.
results.actor: the aspects provided in paragraphs 1 to 9
results.object: of, or combined with, the risk management procedures established pursuant to that law.
results.condition: requirements regarding internal risk management processes under other relevant provisions of Union law

results.text: The risk management system shall be understood as a continuous iterative process planned and run throughout the entire lifecycle of a high-risk AI system, requiring regular systematic review and updating.
results.object: as a continuous iterative process planned and run throughout the entire lifecycle of a high-risk AI system, requiring regular systematic review and updating.
results.temporal: continuous iterative process planned and run

results.text: The risk management system shall comprise the following steps:
results.object: the following steps:

results.text: The risk management system shall comprise the following steps: (a) the identification and analysis of the known and the reasonably foreseeable risks that the high-risk AI system can pose to health, safety or fundamental rights when the high-risk AI system is used in accordance with the following steps : ( a ) the identification and analysis of the known and the reasonably foreseeable risks that the high - risk AI system can pose to health , safety or fundamental rights when the high - risk AI system is used in accordance with the high - risk ai system's intended purpose's intended purpose;
results.object: the following steps: (a) the identification and analysis of the known and the reasonably foreseeable risks that the high-risk AI system can pose to health, safety or fundamental rights when the high-risk AI system is used in accordance with the following steps : ( a ) the identification and analysis of the known and the reasonably foreseeable risks that the high - risk AI system can pose to health , safety or fundamental rights when the high - risk AI system is used in accordance with the high - risk ai system's intended purpose's intended purpose;
results.manner: in accordance with the following steps : ( a ) the identification and analysis of the known and the reasonably foreseeable risks that the high - risk AI system can pose to health
results.condition: when the high-risk AI system is used in accordance with the following steps

results.text: The risk management system shall comprise the following steps: (b) the estimation and evaluation of the risks that may emerge when the high-risk AI system is used in accordance with the following steps : ( b ) the estimation and evaluation of the risks that may emerge when the high - risk AI system is used in accordance with the high - risk ai system's intended purpose , and's intended purpose, and under conditions of reasonably foreseeable misuse;
results.object: the following steps: (b) the estimation and evaluation of the risks that may emerge when the high-risk AI system is used in accordance with the following steps : ( b ) the estimation and evaluation of the risks that may emerge when the high - risk AI system is used in accordance with the high - risk ai system's intended purpose , and's intended purpose, and under conditions of reasonably foreseeable misuse;
results.manner: in accordance with the following steps : ( b ) the estimation and evaluation of the risks that may emerge when the high - risk AI system is used in accordance with the high - risk ai system's intended purpose
results.condition: when the high-risk AI system is used in accordance with the following steps

results.text: The risk management system shall comprise the following steps: (c) the evaluation of other risks possibly arising, based on the analysis of data gathered from the post-market monitoring system referred to in Article 72;
results.object: the following steps: (c) the evaluation of other risks possibly arising, based on the analysis of data gathered from the post-market monitoring system referred to in Article 72;

results.text: The risk management system shall comprise the following steps: (d) the adoption of appropriate and targeted risk management measures designed to address the risks identified pursuant to point (a).
results.object: the following steps: (d) the adoption of appropriate and targeted risk management measures designed to address the risks identified pursuant to point (a).

results.text: The risks referred to in this Article shall concern those which may be reasonably mitigated or eliminated through the development or design of the high-risk AI system, or the provision of adequate technical information.
results.actor: The risks referred to in this Article
results.object: those which may be reasonably mitigated or eliminated through the development or design of the high-risk AI system, or the provision of adequate technical information.
results.manner: through the development or design of the high-risk AI system

results.text: The risk management measures referred to in paragraph 2, point (d), shall give due consideration to the effects and possible interaction resulting from the combined application of the requirements set out in this Section, with a view to minimising risks more effectively while achieving an appropriate balance in implementing the measures to fulfil those requirements.
results.object: due consideration to the effects and possible interaction resulting from the combined application of the requirements set out in this Section, with a view to minimising risks more effectively while achieving an appropriate balance in implementing the measures to fulfil those requirements.
results.manner: with a view to minimising risks more effectively while achieving an appropriate balance in implementing the measures to fulfil those requirements

results.text: The risk management measures referred to in paragraph 2, point (d), shall be such that the relevant residual risk associated with each hazard, as well as the overall residual risk of the high-risk AI systems is judged to be acceptable. In identifying the most appropriate risk management measures, the following shall be ensured:
results.object: that the relevant residual risk associated with each hazard, as well as the overall residual risk of the high-risk AI systems is judged to be acceptable. In identifying the most appropriate risk management measures, the following shall be ensured:

results.text: The risk management measures referred to in paragraph 2, point (d), shall be such that the relevant residual risk associated with each hazard, as well as the overall residual risk of the high-risk AI systems is judged to be acceptable. (a) elimination or reduction of risks identified and evaluated pursuant to paragraph 2 in as far as technically feasible through adequate design and development of the high-risk AI system;
results.object: that the relevant residual risk associated with each hazard, as well as the overall residual risk of the high-risk AI systems is judged to be acceptable. (a) elimination or reduction of risks identified and evaluated pursuant to paragraph 2 in as far as technically feasible through adequate design and development of the high-risk AI system;
results.manner: through adequate design and development of the high-risk AI system
results.condition: in as far as technically feasible

results.text: The risk management measures referred to in paragraph 2, point (d), shall be such that the relevant residual risk associated with each hazard, as well as the overall residual risk of the high-risk AI systems is judged to be acceptable. (b) where appropriate, implementation of adequate mitigation and control measures addressing risks that cannot be eliminated;
results.object: that the relevant residual risk associated with each hazard, as well as the overall residual risk of the high-risk AI systems is judged to be acceptable. (b) where appropriate, implementation of adequate mitigation and control measures addressing risks that cannot be eliminated;
results.condition: where appropriate

results.text: The risk management measures referred to in paragraph 2, point (d), shall be such that the relevant residual risk associated with each hazard, as well as the overall residual risk of the high-risk AI systems is judged to be acceptable. (c) provision of information required pursuant to Article 13 and, where appropriate, training to deployers. With a view to eliminating or reducing risks related to the use of the high-risk AI system, due consideration shall be given to the technical knowledge, experience, education, the training to be expected by the deployer, and the presumable context in which the system is intended to be used.
results.object: that the relevant residual risk associated with each hazard, as well as the overall residual risk of the high-risk AI systems is judged to be acceptable. (c) provision of information required pursuant to Article 13 and, where appropriate, training to deployers. With a view to eliminating or reducing risks related to the use of the high-risk AI system, due consideration shall be given to the technical knowledge, experience, education, the training to be expected by the deployer, and the presumable context in which the system is intended to be used.
results.manner: With a view to eliminating or reducing risks related to the use of the high-risk AI system
results.condition: where appropriate

results.text: The Authority SHALL test high-risk AI systems for the purpose of identifying the most appropriate and targeted risk management measures.
results.object: high-risk AI systems for the purpose of identifying the most appropriate and targeted risk management measures.

results.text: Testing shall ensure that high-risk AI systems perform consistently for Testing's intended purpose and that Testing are in compliance with the requirements set out in this Section.
results.object: that high-risk AI systems perform consistently for Testing's intended purpose and that Testing are in compliance with the requirements set out in this Section.

results.text: Testing procedures may include testing in real-world conditions in accordance with Article 60.
results.object: testing in real-world conditions in accordance with Article 60.
results.manner: in accordance with Article 60

results.text: The testing of high-risk AI systems shall be performed, as appropriate, at any time throughout the development process, and, in any event, prior to The testing of high - risk AI systems' being placed on the market or put into service.
results.actor: The testing of high-risk AI systems
results.object: as appropriate, at any time throughout the development process, and, in any event, prior to The testing of high - risk AI systems' being placed on the market or put into service.
results.condition: as appropriate

results.text: Testing shall be carried out against prior defined metrics and probabilistic thresholds that are appropriate to the intended purpose of the high-risk AI system.
results.object: out against prior defined metrics and probabilistic thresholds that are appropriate to the intended purpose of the high-risk AI system.

results.text: When implementing the risk management system as provided for in paragraphs 1 to 7, providers shall give consideration to whether in view of the risk management system's intended purpose the high-risk AI system is likely to have an adverse impact on persons under the age of 18 and, as appropriate, other vulnerable groups.
results.object: consideration to whether in view of the risk management system's intended purpose the high-risk AI system is likely to have an adverse impact on persons under the age of 18 and, as appropriate, other vulnerable groups.
results.manner: as provided for in paragraphs 1 to 7
results.condition: When implementing the risk management system as provided for in paragraphs 1 to 7

results.text: The Developer SHALL develop high-risk AI systems which make use of techniques involving the training of AI models with data on the basis of training, validation and testing data sets that meet the quality criteria referred to in paragraphs 2 to 5 whenever such data sets are used.
results.object: high-risk AI systems which make use of techniques involving the training of AI models with data on the basis of training, validation and testing data sets that meet the quality criteria referred to in paragraphs 2 to 5 whenever such data sets are used.

results.text: Training, validation and testing data sets shall be subject to data governance and management practices appropriate for the intended purpose of the high-risk AI system.
results.object: to data governance and management practices appropriate for the intended purpose of the high-risk AI system.

results.text: Those practices shall concern in particular:
results.object: in particular:

results.text: Those practices shall concern in particular: (a) the relevant design choices;
results.object: in particular: (a) the relevant design choices;

results.text: Those practices shall concern in particular: (b) data collection processes and the origin of data, and in the case of personal data, the original purpose of the data collection;
results.object: in particular: (b) data collection processes and the origin of data, and in the case of personal data, the original purpose of the data collection;

results.text: Those practices shall concern in particular: (c) relevant data-preparation processing operations, such as annotation, labelling, cleaning, updating, enrichment and aggregation;
results.object: in particular: (c) relevant data-preparation processing operations, such as annotation, labelling, cleaning, updating, enrichment and aggregation;

results.text: Those practices shall concern in particular: (d) the formulation of assumptions, in particular with respect to the information that the data are supposed to measure and represent;
results.object: in particular: (d) the formulation of assumptions, in particular with respect to the information that the data are supposed to measure and represent;

results.text: Those practices shall concern in particular: (e) an assessment of the availability, quantity and suitability of the data sets that are needed;
results.object: in particular: (e) an assessment of the availability, quantity and suitability of the data sets that are needed;

results.text: Those practices shall concern in particular: (f) examination in view of possible biases that are likely to affect the health and safety of persons, have a negative impact on fundamental rights or lead to discrimination prohibited under Union law, especially where data outputs influence inputs for future operations;
results.object: in particular: (f) examination in view of possible biases that are likely to affect the health and safety of persons, have a negative impact on fundamental rights or lead to discrimination prohibited under Union law, especially where data outputs influence inputs for future operations;
results.condition: where data outputs influence inputs for future operations

results.text: Those practices shall concern in particular: (g) appropriate measures to detect, prevent and mitigate possible biases identified according to point (f);
results.object: in particular: (g) appropriate measures to detect, prevent and mitigate possible biases identified according to point (f);

results.text: Those practices shall concern in particular: (h) the identification of relevant data gaps or shortcomings that prevent compliance with this Regulation, and how those gaps
results.object: in particular: (h) the identification of relevant data gaps or shortcomings that prevent compliance with this Regulation, and how those gaps

results.text: and shortcomings can be addressed.
Training, validation and testing data sets shall be relevant, sufficiently representative, and to the best extent possible, free of errors and complete in view of the intended purpose.
results.object: sufficiently representative, and to the best extent possible, free of errors and complete in view of the intended purpose.

results.text: They shall have the appropriate statistical properties, including, where applicable, as regards the persons or groups of persons in relation to whom the high-risk AI system is intended to be used.
results.object: the appropriate statistical properties, including, where applicable, as regards the persons or groups of persons in relation to whom the high-risk AI system is intended to be used.
results.condition: where applicable

results.text: Those characteristics of the data sets may be met at the level of individual data sets or at the level of a combination thereof.
results.actor: Those characteristics of the data sets
results.object: at the level of individual data sets or at the level of a combination thereof.

results.text: Data sets shall take into account, to the extent required by the intended purpose, the characteristics or elements that are particular to the specific geographical, contextual, behavioural or functional setting within which the high-risk AI system is intended to be used.
results.object: into account, to the extent required by the intended purpose, the characteristics or elements that are particular to the specific geographical, contextual, behavioural or functional setting within which the high-risk AI system is intended to be used.
results.temporal: within which the high-risk AI system
results.manner: by the intended purpose

results.text: To the extent that the extent that it is strictly necessary for the purpose of ensuring bias detection and correction in relation to the high - risk AI systems in accordance with paragraph ( 2 ) is strictly necessary for the purpose of ensuring bias detection and correction in relation to the high-risk AI systems in accordance with paragraph (2), points (f) and (g) of this Article, the providers of such systems may exceptionally process special categories of personal data, subject to appropriate safeguards for the fundamental rights and freedoms of natural persons.
results.object: process special categories of personal data, subject to appropriate safeguards for the fundamental rights and freedoms of natural persons.
results.manner: in accordance with paragraph ( 2 ) is strictly necessary for the purpose of ensuring bias detection and correction in relation to the high-risk AI systems in accordance with paragraph (2)
results.condition: for the purpose of ensuring bias detection and correction

results.text: In addition to the provisions set out in Regulations (EU) 2016/679 and (EU) 2018/1725 and Directive (EU) 2016/680, all the following conditions must be met in order for such processing to occur:
results.object: in order for such processing to occur:
results.temporal: following conditions must be met in

results.text: In addition to the provisions set out in Regulations (EU) 2016/679 and (EU) 2018/1725 and Directive (EU) 2016/680, all the following conditions must be met in order for such processing to occur: (a) the bias detection and correction cannot be effectively fulfilled by processing other data, including synthetic or anonymised data;
results.object: in order for such processing to occur: (a) the bias detection and correction cannot be effectively fulfilled by processing other data, including synthetic or anonymised data;
results.temporal: following conditions must be met in
results.manner: by processing other data
results.condition: the bias detection and correction cannot be effectively fulfilled by processing other data, including synthetic or anonymised data

results.text: In addition to the provisions set out in Regulations (EU) 2016/679 and (EU) 2018/1725 and Directive (EU) 2016/680, all the following conditions must be met in order for such processing to occur: (b) the special categories of personal data are subject to technical limitations on the re-use of the personal data, and state-of-the-art security and privacy-preserving measures, including pseudonymisation;
results.object: in order for such processing to occur: (b) the special categories of personal data are subject to technical limitations on the re-use of the personal data, and state-of-the-art security and privacy-preserving measures, including pseudonymisation;

results.object: in order for such processing to occur: (c) the special categories of personal data are subject to measures to ensure that the personal data processed are secured, protected, subject to suitable safeguards, including strict controls and documentation of the access, to avoid misuse and ensure that only authorised persons have access to those personal data with appropriate confidentiality obligations;

results.object: in order for such processing to occur: (d) the special categories of personal data are not to be transmitted, transferred or otherwise accessed by other parties;

results.text: The Developer SHALL develop high-risk AI systems not using techniques involving the training of AI models, and paragraphs 2 to 5 apply only to the testing data sets.
results.object: high-risk AI systems not using techniques involving the training of AI models, and paragraphs 2 to 5 apply only to the testing data sets.
results.manner: not using techniques involving the training of AI models

results.text: The Provider SHALL draw up technical documentation of a high-risk AI system before that system is placed on the market. The Provider SHALL draw up technical documentation in such a way as to demonstrate that the high-risk AI system complies with the requirements set out in this Section and to provide national competent authorities and notified bodies with the necessary information in a clear and comprehensive form to assess the compliance of the AI system with those requirements. A high-risk AI system SHALL contain, at a minimum, the elements set out in Annex IV. SMEs, including start-ups, MAY provide the elements of the technical documentation specified in Annex IV in a simplified manner. To that end, the Commission SHALL establish a simplified technical documentation form targeted at the needs of small and microenterprises. Where an SME, including a start-up, opts to provide the information required in Annex IV in a simplified manner, a high-risk AI system SHALL use the form referred to in this paragraph. Notified bodies SHALL accept the form for the purposes of the conformity assessment.
results.object: up technical documentation of a high-risk AI system before that system is placed on the market. The Provider SHALL draw up technical documentation in such a way as to demonstrate that the high-risk AI system complies with the requirements set out in this Section and to provide national competent authorities and notified bodies with the necessary information in a clear and comprehensive form to assess the compliance of the AI system with those requirements. A high-risk AI system SHALL contain, at a minimum, the elements set out in Annex IV. SMEs, including start-ups, MAY provide the elements of the technical documentation specified in Annex IV in a simplified manner. To that end, the Commission SHALL establish a simplified technical documentation form targeted at the needs of small and microenterprises. Where an SME, including a start-up, opts to provide the information required in Annex IV in a simplified manner, a high-risk AI system SHALL use the form referred to in this paragraph. Notified bodies SHALL accept the form for the purposes of the conformity assessment.
results.condition: Where an SME

results.text: The Manufacturer SHALL draw up a single set of technical documentation containing all the information set out in paragraph 1, as well as the information required under those legal acts where a high-risk ai system related to a product covered by the union harmonisation legislation listed in section a of annex i is placed on the market or put into service.
results.object: up a single set of technical documentation containing all the information set out in paragraph 1, as well as the information required under those legal acts where a high-risk ai system related to a product covered by the union harmonisation legislation listed in section a of annex i is placed on the market or put into service.
results.temporal: by the union harmonisation legislation listed

results.text: The Commission IS empowered to adopt delegated acts in accordance with Article 97 in order to amend Annex IV, where necessary, to ensure that, in light of technical progress, the documentation THE COMMISSION PROVIDES provides all the information necessary to assess the compliance of the system with the requirements set out in this Section.
results.object: delegated acts
results.manner: in accordance with Article 97 in order to amend Annex IV
results.condition: where necessary

results.text: High-risk AI systems shall technically allow for the automatic recording of events (logs) over the lifetime of the system.
results.object: allow for the automatic recording of events (logs) over the lifetime of the system.

results.text: In order to ensure a level of traceability of the functioning of a high-risk AI system that is appropriate to the intended purpose of the system, logging capabilities shall enable the recording of events relevant for:
results.object: the recording of events relevant for:

results.text: In order to ensure a level of traceability of the functioning of a high-risk AI system that is appropriate to the intended purpose of the system, logging capabilities shall enable the recording of events relevant for: (a) identifying situations that may result in the high-risk AI system presenting a risk within the meaning of Article 79(1) or in a substantial modification;
results.object: the recording of events relevant for: (a) identifying situations that may result in the high-risk AI system presenting a risk within the meaning of Article 79(1) or in a substantial modification;

results.text: In order to ensure a level of traceability of the functioning of a high-risk AI system that is appropriate to the intended purpose of the system, logging capabilities shall enable the recording of events relevant for: (b) facilitating the post-market monitoring referred to in Article 72; and
results.object: the recording of events relevant for: (b) facilitating the post-market monitoring referred to in Article 72; and

results.text: In order to ensure a level of traceability of the functioning of a high-risk AI system that is appropriate to the intended purpose of the system, logging capabilities shall enable the recording of events relevant for: (c) monitoring the operation of high-risk AI systems referred to in Article 26(5).
results.object: the recording of events relevant for: (c) monitoring the operation of high-risk AI systems referred to in Article 26(5).

results.text: For high-risk AI systems referred to in point 1 (a), of Annex III, the logging capabilities shall provide, at a minimum:
results.object: at a minimum:
results.condition: For high-risk AI systems referred to in point 1 (a), of Annex III

results.text: For high-risk AI systems referred to in point 1 (a), of Annex III, the logging capabilities shall provide, at a minimum: (a) recording of the period of each use of the system (start date and time and end date and time of each use);
results.object: at a minimum: (a) recording of the period of each use of the system (start date and time and end date and time of each use);
results.temporal: start date and time and end date and time of each use

results.text: For high-risk AI systems referred to in point 1 (a), of Annex III, the logging capabilities shall provide, at a minimum: (b) the reference database against which input data has been checked by the system;
results.object: at a minimum: (b) the reference database against which input data has been checked by the system;
results.manner: by the system

results.text: For high-risk AI systems referred to in point 1 (a), of Annex III, the logging capabilities shall provide, at a minimum: (c) the input data for which the search has led to a match;
results.object: at a minimum: (c) the input data for which the search has led to a match;

results.text: For high-risk AI systems referred to in point 1 (a), of Annex III, the logging capabilities shall provide, at a minimum: (d) the identification of the natural persons involved in the verification of the results, as referred to in Article 14(5).
results.object: at a minimum: (d) the identification of the natural persons involved in the verification of the results, as referred to in Article 14(5).
results.condition: at a minimum

results.text: deployer High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed in such a way as to ensure that High - risk AI systems' operation is sufficiently transparent to enable deployers to interpret a system's output and use such a way appropriately.
results.object: and developed in such a way as to ensure that High - risk AI systems' operation is sufficiently transparent to enable deployers to interpret a system's output and use such a way appropriately.

results.text: deployer An appropriate type and degree of transparency shall be ensured with a view to achieving compliance with the relevant obligations of the provider and deployer set out in Section 3.
results.actor: deployer An appropriate type and degree of transparency
results.object: with a view to achieving compliance with the relevant obligations of the provider and deployer set out in Section 3.
results.manner: with a view to achieving compliance with the relevant obligations of the provider and deployer set out in Section 3

results.text: The Deployer SHALL accompany high-risk AI systems with instructions for use in an appropriate digital format or otherwise that include concise, complete, correct and clear information that is relevant, accessible and comprehensible to deployers.
results.object: high-risk AI systems with instructions for use in an appropriate digital format or otherwise that include concise, complete, correct and clear information that is relevant, accessible and comprehensible to deployers.
results.manner: in an appropriate digital format or otherwise
results.condition: that include concise, complete, correct and clear information that is relevant, accessible and comprehensible to deployers

results.text: The instructions for use shall contain least the following information:
results.object: least the following information:

results.text: The instructions for use shall contain least the following information: (a) the identity and the contact details of the provider and, where applicable, of use's authorised representative;
results.object: least the following information: (a) the identity and the contact details of the provider and, where applicable, of use's authorised representative;
results.condition: where applicable

results.object: least the following information: (b) the characteristics, capabilities and limitations of performance of the high-risk AI system, including:
results.condition: least the following

results.text: The instructions for use shall contain least the following information: (i) use's intended purpose;
results.object: least the following information: (i) use's intended purpose;

results.text: (ii) The Provider can expect the level of accuracy, including accuracy's metrics, robustness and cybersecurity referred to in Article 15 against which the high-risk AI system has been tested and validated, and any known and foreseeable circumstances that may have an impact on that expected level of accuracy, robustness and cybersecurity;
results.actor: and any known and foreseeable circumstances that

results.text: The Deployer SHALL be provided with the high-risk AI system in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate:
results.object: with the high-risk AI system in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate:

results.text: The Deployer SHALL be provided with the high-risk AI system in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate: (a) to properly understand the relevant capacities and limitations of the high-risk AI system and be able to duly monitor the high-risk ai system's operation, including in view of detecting and addressing anomalies, dysfunctions and unexpected performance;
results.object: with the high-risk AI system in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate: (a) to properly understand the relevant capacities and limitations of the high-risk AI system and be able to duly monitor the high-risk ai system's operation, including in view of detecting and addressing anomalies, dysfunctions and unexpected performance;
results.manner: such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate

results.text: The Deployer SHALL provide the high-risk AI system to the deployer in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate: (b) to remain aware of the possible tendency of automatically relying or over-relying on the output produced by a high-risk AI system (automation bias), in particular for high-risk AI systems used to provide information or recommendations for decisions to be taken by natural persons;

results.text: The Deployer SHALL be provided with the high-risk AI system in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate: (e) to intervene in the operation of the high-risk AI system or interrupt the system through a 'stop' button or a similar procedure that allows the system to come to a halt in a safe state.
results.object: with the high-risk AI system in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate: (e) to intervene in the operation of the high-risk AI system or interrupt the system through a 'stop' button or a similar procedure that allows the system to come to a halt in a safe state.
results.manner: through a 'stop' button or a similar procedure that allows the system to come to a halt in a safe state

results.text: For high-risk AI systems referred to in point 1(a) of Annex III, the measures referred to in paragraph 3 of this Article shall be such as to ensure that, in addition, no action or decision is taken by the deployer on the basis of the identification resulting from the system unless that identification has been separately verified and confirmed by at least two natural persons with the necessary competence, training and authority. The requirement for a separate verification by at least two natural persons shall not apply to high-risk AI systems used for the purposes of law enforcement, migration, border control or asylum, where Union or national law considers the application of this requirement to be disproportionate.
results.actor: training and authority. The requirement for a separate verification by at least two natural persons
results.object: to high-risk AI systems used for the purposes of law enforcement, migration, border control or asylum, where Union or national law considers the application of this requirement to be disproportionate.
results.temporal: by the deployer on the basis
results.manner: by the deployer on the basis of the identification resulting from the system unless that identification has been separately verified and confirmed by at least two natural persons with the necessary competence
results.condition: unless that identification has been separately verified and confirmed by at least two natural persons with the necessary competence

results.text: The Provider SHALL design develop High-risk AI systems in such a way that The Provider achieve an appropriate level of accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity, and perform consistently throughout The Provider's lifecycle.
results.object: develop High-risk AI systems in such a way that The Provider achieve an appropriate level of accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity, and perform consistently throughout The Provider's lifecycle.
results.manner: in such a way that

results.text: The Commission SHALL, in cooperation with relevant stakeholders and organisations such as metrology and benchmarking authorities, encourage, as appropriate, the development of benchmarks and measurement methodologies.
results.object: cooperation with relevant stakeholders and organisations such as metrology and benchmarking authorities
results.manner: as appropriate

results.text: The Regulator SHALL declare the levels of accuracy and the relevant accuracy metrics of high-risk AI systems in the accompanying instructions of use.
results.object: the levels of accuracy and the relevant accuracy metrics of high-risk AI systems in the accompanying instructions of use.

results.text: High-risk AI systems shall be as resilient as possible regarding errors, faults The robustness of high-risk AI systems may be achieved through technical redundancy solutions, which may include backup or fail-safe plans. High-risk AI systems that continue to learn after being placed on the market or put into service shall be developed in such a way as to eliminate or reduce as far as possible the risk of possibly biased outputs influencing input for future operations (feedback loops), and as to ensure that any such feedback loops are duly addressed with appropriate mitigation measures.
results.object: resilient as possible regarding errors, faults The robustness of high-risk AI systems may be achieved through technical redundancy solutions, which may include backup or fail-safe plans. High-risk AI systems that continue to learn after being placed on the market or put into service shall be developed in such a way as to eliminate or reduce as far as possible the risk of possibly biased outputs influencing input for future operations (feedback loops), and as to ensure that any such feedback loops are duly addressed with appropriate mitigation measures.
results.temporal: after being placed on the market
results.manner: through technical redundancy solutions

results.text: or inconsistencies that may occur within the system or the environment in which the system operates, in particular due to the environment in which the system's interaction with natural persons or other systems.
results.object: within the system or the environment in which the system operates, in particular due to the environment in which the system's interaction with natural persons or other systems.
results.temporal: within the system or the environment

results.text: The Provider SHALL take technical and organisational measures in this regard.
results.object: technical and organisational measures in this regard.

results.text: High-risk AI systems shall be resilient against attempts by unauthorised third parties to alter High - risk AI systems' use, outputs or performance by exploiting system vulnerabilities. The technical solutions aiming to ensure the cybersecurity of high-risk AI systems shall be appropriate to the relevant circumstances and the risks. The technical solutions to address AI specific vulnerabilities shall include, where appropriate, measures to prevent, detect, respond to, resolve and control for attacks trying to manipulate the training data set (data poisoning), or pre-trained components used in training (model poisoning), inputs designed to cause the AI model to make a mistake (adversarial examples or model evasion), confidentiality attacks or model flaws.
results.object: against attempts by unauthorised third parties to alter High - risk AI systems' use, outputs or performance by exploiting system vulnerabilities. The technical solutions aiming to ensure the cybersecurity of high-risk AI systems shall be appropriate to the relevant circumstances and the risks. The technical solutions to address AI specific vulnerabilities shall include, where appropriate, measures to prevent, detect, respond to, resolve and control for attacks trying to manipulate the training data set (data poisoning), or pre-trained components used in training (model poisoning), inputs designed to cause the AI model to make a mistake (adversarial examples or model evasion), confidentiality attacks or model flaws.
results.temporal: by unauthorised third parties to alter
results.manner: by unauthorised third parties to alter High - risk AI systems' use
results.condition: where appropriate
